headline: 《痴迷》领跑今日娱乐热点
summary: 今日无新片上映，但《痴迷》《海洋奇缘：启航》等片持续霸榜，本周《火遮眼》新晋热门。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but "Obsession" and "Moana: Voyage" continue to trend, with "Fire in the Eyes" joining the weekly top.

industryHighlights.text: 《安昂传奇：最后的气宗》即将上映
《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》定档预告引期待
industryHighlights.en: "Spider-Man: Brand New Day" trailer sparks anticipation
"Fire in the Eyes" enters weekly trend chart
